keyFindings.description: loadGitHubApps() (env-based, L312-329) still silently ignores partial GitHub App role config. Plan says 'Make partial GitHub App role config a hard error' — YAML path validates correctly but env path does not.
L243: config.stateFilePath mutation after resolveDaemonConfig() breaks 'resolve once, use everywhere' contract. Value is redundant with what resolveDaemonConfig already computes.
Dual daemonPortExplicit sources (DaemonConfig and DaemonStartOptions) without documenting the override chain.
Missing integration-level error-path tests for cmdStart with missing config file and invalid YAML (unit-level coverage exists in loadConfigFromFile tests).
